summary.summary: Release patch (Trio v0.8.2) that: makes OmnipodKit the only Omnipod driver by removing OmniBLE and OmniKit submodules and consolidating onboarding/Add Pump to a single "All Omnipod Types" entry; adds Live Activity visual and localization fixes (renders active temp targets as a green band with a named badge, fixes indefinite override rendering so it no longer collapses the chart rule to the current moment, and corrects/ localizes COB and widget item labels); fixes watch app back-sync/stale-data processing to improve watch responsiveness; fixes Stats → Meals so today's carbs, fat, and protein macros display correctly; and includes CI config bumps to APP_DEV_VERSION in Config.xcconfig (updated to 0.8.1.2 and then 0.8.1.3 in successive commits).
summary.userFacingImpact: Users should see: only OmnipodKit available when adding/onboarding Omnipod pumps (OmniBLE/OmniKit submodules removed) (pr:gordolio/Trio#1212, pr:nightscout/Trio#1212); Live Activity lock-screen widget/chart will show active temp targets as a green band with a named badge, indefinite overrides will render correctly, and widget labels/COB text are localized/corrected (pr:gordolio/Trio#1212, pr:nightscout/Trio#1212); Apple Watch users should observe improved responsiveness and faster recovery from stale data (pr:gordolio/Trio#1212, pr:nightscout/Trio#1212); and the Meals stats chart will include today's macros (carbs, fat, protein) correctly (pr:gordolio/Trio#1212, pr:nightscout/Trio#1212). The CI/app dev version was incremented in Config.xcconfig (commit:8efab96c8c5dc4a5cfaa89928ebf871ea71ef55c, commit:ebebe817e3f74aee3ed407884a3dda0ff9f0430c, diff:6b407ea4d5cc, file:5692afcf1358).
